name: Arthur Fyreclaw
sd_appearance: Middle-aged human with a gaunt, emaciated frame, piercing green eyes that glow in the dark, and a scar running down his left cheek, clad in tattered cult robes of grey wrappings and sporting a makeshift metal-banded staff. A hidden dagger peeks from beneath his robes, while his distinctive visual detail, a pendant of a glowing flame, hangs around his neck, casting an eerie glow in the dimly lit Undercity.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: cult's grey wrappings, makeshift metal-banded staff, fervent expression
